_note: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for YouTube videos embedded on ninja360.net. One entry per placed video. Each video on the site uses the click-to-play facade in components/video-embed.html plus a VideoObject JSON-LD block in that page's GHL Head. Fill 'duration' (ISO 8601, e.g. PT2M30S) before publishing to earn the search-result duration badge - it is a recommended (not required) field, so schema is valid without it.
